He emphasized staying fully invested, favoring banks, consumption, and food delivery sectors.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.

news.title:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.
Key stocks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, and Axis Bank may benefit; RBI expected to hold rates at 5.25%.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.

news.title:
HDFC Bank saw an NSE block trade of ~256,388 shares at Rs. 773.
The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 19.82 crore.

news.title:
HDFC Bank saw FIIs reduce holdings by 3.6% in Q4 FY26, while DIIs increased stakes by 3.1%, showing mixed investor sentiment.
Stock closed at ₹772.45, down 12.1% YoY, trading 24.3% below 52-week high; key domestic, global investors showed confidence.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank saw FIIs reduce holdings by 3.6% in Q4 FY26, while DIIs increased stakes by 3.1%, showing mixed investor sentiment.
Stock closed at ₹772.45, down 12.1% YoY, trading 24.3% below 52-week high; key domestic, global investors showed confidence.

news.title:
FPIs sold ₹1.18L crore in Indian equities in March 2026, with ₹60.7K crore from financial services.
Nifty Bank dropped 17%, HDFC Bank fell 17.6% amid FPI outflows; capital goods saw ₹3.1K crore inflows.
news.summary:
FPIs sold ₹1.18L crore in Indian equities in March 2026, with ₹60.7K crore from financial services.
Nifty Bank dropped 17%, HDFC Bank fell 17.6% amid FPI outflows; capital goods saw ₹3.1K crore inflows.
